title: Customize redirect behavior
excerpt: Display a confirmation page with your customer's order information. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Full hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/custom-success-page.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted) - [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/custom-success-page.md?payment-ui=embedded-page) - [Embedded form](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/custom-success-page.md?payment-ui=checkout-form)
